title: Workplace head injury after pipe fell from derrick
description: At work on a drill rig, a pipe fell from the derrick onto his head.

title: ER presentation with head, neck, left shoulder pain
description: Emergency Department presentation with head pain, neck pain, and left shoulder pain after the injury.

title: Left scalp/periorbital injury findings
description: Exam found left scalp swelling and periorbital bruising around the left eye.

title: CT head result
description: CT head impression: soft tissue swelling and no intracranial hemorrhage.
sourceExcerpt: Electronically signed by Sarah Orrin MD. Reagan Memorial Hospital - Medical.

title: C2 fracture imaging result
description: Cervical spine impression: nondisplaced C2 facet and lamina fracture.
sourceExcerpt: Electronically signed by Sarah Orrin MD. Reagan Memorial Hospital - Medical.

title: Scapular fracture imaging result
description: Left shoulder and humerus radiographs impression: left scapular body fracture.
sourceExcerpt: Electronically signed by Sarah Orrin MD. Reagan Memorial Hospital - Medical.

title: Grouped medications
description: Encounter medications documented: hydromorphone, ondansetron, ketorolac, tdap, acetaminophen.

title: Transferred to Shannon for higher level care
description: Transferred to Shannon Medical Center for higher-level trauma care.
sourceExcerpt: Patient was accepting physician: Dr. Vretis at Shannon ER for higher level of care.
